items.name_en: 《Export Product》Milk White! Large OHANEL 25B Affinity Duma Backpack. The hottest one is definitely Duma, super high popularity 🆙, finally a classic return in the 25B series 🌟🌟. The zipper pull tab and leather drawstring feature classic quilted elements. The material is still calfskin, black and gold colorway is versatile and premium √. The leather is glossy and shiny 👅👅, and it's wear-resistant, so you don't need to worry too much about using it. The bag shape is compact and sharp! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! The capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Dimensions: 25x22.5x15cm

items.name_en: 《Grey Military Green》CHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double-pocket chain ⛓️ bag, airport shopping bag! This brown double-pocket bag is really special 🤩. The dusty green overall look has a great vibe. It feels very cool when worn! Definitely a viral aesthetic bright color. The inner small cowhide feels super soft and chewy. Easy to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Flirt is the one! Can take it home~! Like its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double-pocket bag is so beautiful! The material feels like a mix of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not hard either, just right. This color is also great for grandma's outfits 😍😍 Size: 34x25x10cm

items.name_en: 《Light Apricot》🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

items.name_en: 《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Brown Sheepskin
items.name_cn:
《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Brown Sheepskin
This tote features Matelasse craftsmanship, offering a fresh interpretation of a classic silhouette with a 3D texture and exquisite texture. The front letter logo and metal hardware subtly complement each other, with exquisite workmanship that stands out, showcasing a highly recognizable classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with a modern charm.
~Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
~Zipper closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB123.
Size: W19×H13×Dcm.
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather
Made in Italy

This tote features Matelasse craftsmanship, offering a fresh interpretation of a classic silhouette with a 3D texture and exquisite texture. The front letter logo and metal hardware subtly complement each other, with exquisite workmanship that stands out, showcasing a highly recognizable classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with a modern charm.
~Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
~Zipper closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB123.
Size: W19×H13×Dcm.
Color: Cognac full leather/Original leather
Made in Italy
